landing.headline: Share code and take questions — live.
landing.subtitle: Create a session, share the link, start presenting.
landing.featureClipboardDesc: Share code snippets and links instantly. Every connected device sees updates in under 200ms.
landing.featureQaDesc: Audience members submit questions and vote up the best ones — no app download needed.
landing.featureNoSignupDesc: Create a session in seconds. Share the link. Done.

session.secretWarning: Save this secret now — it won't be shown again.

session.speaker: Speaker
session.noQuestions: No questions yet. Be the first to ask!
session.clipboardEmpty: Waiting for the speaker to share code snippets.
session.clearAllDesc: This will remove all snippets from the clipboard. This cannot be undone.
session.deleteSnippetDesc: This snippet will be permanently removed.

pages.sessionNotFoundDesc: This session may have ended or the link is incorrect.
pages.hostControlsDesc: Use the clipboard and Q&A panels to manage the session.
pages.pageExpired: This page is only available immediately after session creation.
